refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation communication quality such that packet loss does not exceed the customer-defined limit under agreed network conditions.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR clarifies the performance metric (packet loss) and ties it explicitly to customer-defined limits and network conditions, ensuring measurable and testable requirements.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure packet loss percentage during teleoperation sessions under controlled network conditions and verify it remains within the customer-defined limit.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report packet loss status to relevant system components.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement adaptive communication protocol with error correction and retransmission.
DP2: Use dedicated high-reliability network link with QoS prioritization.
DP3: Real-time packet loss monitoring and dynamic adjustment of teleoperation data rate.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement adaptive communication protocol with error correction and retransmission.

potential_sources: Interaction between communication protocol and teleoperation control logic
Dependency on network link quality and telemetry data
coupling_check.notes: DP1 logically isolates communication quality management, minimizing coupling with other system functions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes network conditions allow for adaptive protocol effectiveness.
Risk of increased latency due to retransmissions impacting teleoperation responsiveness.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating latency monitoring as part of the adaptive protocol to balance packet loss and responsiveness.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Module responsible for teleoperation control, communication management, and related data processing.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Physical and logical network connection used for teleoperation data exchange.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Incoming telemetry data from vehicle sensors to support communication quality assessment.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Commands and control signals sent to the vehicle for teleoperation.

module_containment_scores.notes: Broad scope but less focused containment of teleoperation communication logic.
Vehicle module primarily hardware-focused; poor containment of communication protocol logic.
Best containment and minimal diffusion; aligns with teleoperation communication responsibility.
Safety services focus on alerts and policies, not communication protocol.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning DP1 to Teleoperation module centralizes communication quality management, reducing diffusion and improving maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential overlap with Network Link interface management in NGHE Solution module.
Dependency on telemetry data accuracy from Vehicle module.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Clarify interface ownership and responsibilities between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules to avoid overlap.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR with clear mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Minor risk of overlapping network link management between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Teleoperation module provides strong containment for communication protocol DP.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by monitoring packet loss metrics within the Teleoperation module during system tests.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of communication quality responsibility to Teleoperation module.

recommended_revisions: Define explicit interface ownership and responsibilities for Network Link between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution.
Consider latency impact in future FR refinements.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and assignments meet the requirements with acceptable risks and clear ownership. No immediate need to revise or zigzag down.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report packet loss status to relevant system components.

revise.why: Current FR, DP, and IM assignments are consistent and verifiable.

assumptions: Network conditions are within agreed parameters.
Telemetry data from Vehicle module is accurate and timely.
open_risks: Latency impact due to retransmission in adaptive protocol.
Interface ownership overlap between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules.
evidence_needed: Test data on packet loss under various network conditions.
